{{Missing Info|specifics=Source, Special Stats, Relic Resonances, Mirage name & final rewards, Mirage 1-3, Description}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=Santa Maria
|available=1
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=[[Events#Badge Shop|Badge Shop Relic #11]] (600 Badges)
|description=
|fame=108
|art=54
|fth=57
|civ=62
|tech=81
|ss1=All Minion DEF +?%<br>Protomons assist Troop in battle, and deal extra DMG +?<br>Per 10 TECH Pistils used, Snail ATK +?<br>TECH Pistils Used: 400/400
|ss2=All Minion DEF +?%<br>Protomons assist Troop in battle, and deal extra DMG +?<br>Per 10 TECH Pistils used, Snail ATK +?<br>TECH Pistils Used: 400/400
|ss3=All Minion DEF +?%<br>Protomons assist Troop in battle, and deal extra DMG +?<br>Per 10 TECH Pistils used, Snail ATK +?<br>TECH Pistils Used: 400/400
|ss4=All Minion DEF +?%<br>Protomons assist Troop in battle, and deal extra DMG +?<br>Per 10 TECH Pistils used, Snail ATK +?<br>TECH Pistils Used: 400/400
|ss5=All Minion DEF +?%<br>Protomons assist Troop in battle, and deal extra DMG +?<br>Per 10 TECH Pistils used, Snail ATK +?<br>TECH Pistils Used: 400/400
|ss6=All Minion DEF +2.4%<br>Protomons assist Troop in battle, and deal extra DMG +960<br>Per 10 TECH Pistils used, Snail ATK +16<br>TECH Pistils Used: 400/400
|ss7=All Minion DEF +2.4%<br>Protomons assist Troop in battle, and deal extra DMG +960<br>Per 10 TECH Pistils used, Snail ATK +16<br>TECH Pistils Used: 400/400<br>Protomons assist Troop in battle, and deal extra DMG +800 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]] Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Wind DMG +300
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]] Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Incense Drops +3%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]] Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Card Drops +6%
|mirage={{Mirage
|name=
|reward=
|3name=
|3rec=
|3atk=
|3def=
|3hp=
|3weak=
}}
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Orange Relics]]
[[Category:FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Orange FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Leadership Boost]]
[[Category:Minion DEF Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Protomon Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Badge Shop Relics]]
